meta.notes: Canonical brand tokens for Leopard AI / SonicFlow. All platform theme files MUST be generated from this JSON — no hex literals outside brand/.

brand.tagline: Chakra-tuned audio layers for every mind state.

root.name: Root (Muladhara)
root.role: Grounding, instinct. Used sparingly for warnings and deep-bass visualizations.

sacral.name: Sacral (Svadhisthana)
sacral.role: Creativity, flow of emotion. Secondary accent for brand surfaces.

solar.name: Solar Plexus (Manipura)
solar.role: Willpower, clarity. Used for highlight states and premium markers.

heart.name: Heart (Anahata)
heart.role: Balance, calm. Canonical color for the Meditation mode.

throat.name: Throat (Vishuddha)
throat.role: Expression, focus. Canonical color for the Focus mode.

thirdEye.name: Third Eye (Ajna)
thirdEye.role: Insight, flow. Canonical color for the Flow mode.

crown.name: Crown (Sahasrara)
crown.role: Stillness, rest. Canonical color for the Sleep mode.

gold.role: Leopard spot highlight, primary brand accent

meditation.label: Meditation
meditation.description: Soft theta pacing for inward focus.

modeGlow.notes: Use with --mode-color (CSS) or modeColor (native). Native platforms implement this with drop-shadow or blur-effect layers.

rules: Leopard pattern MUST sit behind a blurred panel — never directly under body text.
Use 10–18% opacity on dark surfaces; never above 25%.
Pattern is generated procedurally until SF-29 replaces it with the real leopard asset.

logo.clearspace: Equal to the height of the mark's cap height on all sides.
logo.placementDark: Gold #D4A24C on dark ink; glow allowed on hero surfaces.
logo.placementLight: Use ink #0A0A0B on any light surface (never gold on white).
